# Serhii Shramko's Portfolio

> This is the personal portfolio and blog of Serhii Shramko, a Senior Software Engineer specializing in frontend development. This site showcases his professional experience, blog posts, and code snippets.

This website is built using Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. It's an open-source project, and the source code is available on GitHub. The content is written in Markdown.

## Key Information

- [About](https://shramko.dev/about): Detailed information about Serhii Shramko's professional experience, skills, and background.
- [Blog](https://shramko.dev/blog): Articles on web development, including topics like React, Next.js, TypeScript, and performance optimization.
- [Snippets](https://shramko.dev/snippets): A collection of useful code snippets for various programming tasks.
- [Dashboard](https://shramko.dev/dashboard): A personal dashboard displaying real-time data from GitHub and other sources.
- [Gear](https://shramko.dev/gear): A curated list of hardware and software that Serhii uses for development and daily tasks.
- [Product Hunt](https://www.producthunt.com/@shramko_dev): A personal Product Hunt page with projects.

## Projects

- [Quizlet Quicklist](https://shramko.dev/quizlet-list): A tool to enhance Quizlet by allowing users to create and manage study lists quickly.
- [Udemy Progress Reset](https://shramko.dev/udemy-reset-progress): A utility to reset progress on Udemy courses.

## Social & Professional Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/shramkoweb): Find the source code for this portfolio and other projects.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/shramko-dev/): Professional profile and recommendations.
